name: Pokai Bay
tagline: The calmest water on the west side thanks to a protective breakwater — a true locals' family beach.
parking: Free lot at Pokai Bay Beach Park
bestTime: Year-round; the breakwater keeps the bay calm even when other west side beaches are rough
talkStory: The breakwater here makes this the safest swimming on the west side — the water inside is basically a pool. This is a real community beach; you'll see local families camping, fishing, and hanging out all weekend. The ancient Ku'ilioloa Heiau (temple) sits on the point and is worth a respectful visit. Not a tourist beach at all, so be respectful of the neighborhood vibe.
